pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh SQL INSERT statements and README patient table. Setup script seeds exactly these PIDs as patients missing Shingrix vaccine.
Verified against setup_task.sh. PID 30 (Clarence Webb) is seeded with all three recommended vaccines including Zoster (Shingrix), serving as the negative case.
setup_task.sh line 50-52 seeds patient 27 (Virginia Slagle) with only Influenza and Pneumovax 23, without Shingrix.
setup_task.sh line 31 demographic INSERT and line 50 immunization INSERT confirm name.
setup_task.sh line 31 demographics table INSERT confirms DOB. Age as of task date 2026-03-08: 77 years old (senior, 65+).
setup_task.sh lines 50-52 seed exactly these two vaccines for PID 27. Vaccine names verified against CDC CVX codes: CVX 141=Influenza seasonal, CVX 33=PPV23 polysaccharide vaccine.
setup_task.sh line 55-56 seeds patient 28 (Harold Dunbar) with only Influenza, without Shingrix or Pneumovax.
setup_task.sh line 32 demographic INSERT confirms name.
setup_task.sh line 32 demographics table INSERT confirms DOB. Age as of task date 2026-03-08: 80 years old (senior, 65+).
setup_task.sh lines 55-56 seed only Influenza vaccine for PID 28, no Pneumovax or Shingrix.
setup_task.sh line 59-61 seeds patient 29 (Agnes Morley) with Influenza and Pneumovax 23, without Shingrix.
setup_task.sh line 33 demographic INSERT confirms name.
setup_task.sh line 33 demographics table INSERT confirms DOB. Age as of task date 2026-03-08: 74 years old (senior, 65+).
setup_task.sh lines 59-61 seed exactly these two vaccines for PID 29.
setup_task.sh line 64-67 seeds patient 30 as the fully vaccinated noise patient.
setup_task.sh line 34 demographic INSERT confirms name.
setup_task.sh line 34 demographics table INSERT confirms DOB. Age as of task date 2026-03-08: 75 years old (senior, 65+).

setup_task.sh lines 65-67 seed all three vaccines for PID 30. CVX codes verified: 141=Influenza, 33=PPV23, 187=Zoster recombinant (Shingrix). CDC confirms Shingrix recommended for all adults 50+ and all seniors 65+.
Confirmed in task description (line 5), setup script echo output (line 129), README (line 20, 39), and verifier (line 73, 75). Export script checks for appointments with date matching 2026-09-15.

Confirmed in task description (line 5), setup script echo output (line 129), README (line 20, 39). Export script checks for appointments on 2026-09-15 (time component not explicitly verified in export queries, but stated requirement is 9:00 AM).

verifier.py line 95: 'passed = score >= 60'. Scoring: 15 pts per vaccine (3 patients × 15 = 45 pts) + 10 pts per appointment (3 × 10 = 30 pts) + 25 pt bonus for all complete = 100 pts max. Pass threshold of 60 requires at least 2 complete patients (50 pts) + third vaccine (15 pts) = 65 pts, or equivalent combinations.

privileged_info_summary: Vaccine audit task for NOSH EHR involves four senior patients (ages 74-80). Three patients (PIDs 27, 28, 29) are missing CDC-recommended Zoster vaccine (Shingrix, CVX code 187): Virginia Slagle (77, has Influenza and Pneumovax 23), Harold Dunbar (80, has only Influenza), and Agnes Morley (74, has Influenza and Pneumovax 23). One patient (PID 30, Clarence Webb, age 75) is fully vaccinated including Shingrix (noise case). Agent must add Shingrix records and schedule 2026-09-15 at 9:00 AM appointments for the three target patients. Task passes at 60 points (out of 100 max), requiring at least 2 complete patient interventions (vaccine + appointment). All recommended vaccines and CVX codes verified against CDC standards.
